hero.title: Analyze Your GitHub PRs with AI
hero.subtitle: Get instant AI-powered insights on code quality, impact, and AI usage across your pull requests.
hero.trust: Free • No login required • Public repos only

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get AI-powered insights on your pull requests.

step1.title: Paste Your Repo URL
step1.description: Enter any public GitHub repository URL and we'll fetch the latest merged pull requests.

step2.title: AI Analyzes PRs
step2.description: Our AI engine scores each PR on impact, AI-leverage, and code quality using Claude.

step3.title: Get Your Report
step3.description: View detailed scores, charts, and actionable insights in an interactive dashboard.

scoring.title: What We Measure
scoring.subtitle: Every pull request is scored across three key dimensions to give you a complete picture.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Does the PR deliver real value? We measure meaningful changes versus trivial fixes and boilerplate.

aiLeverage.title: AI Leverage
aiLeverage.description: Is there evidence of AI-assisted development? Higher scores reward skillful use of AI tools.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Engineering excellence: focused scope, clean code, test coverage, and clear PR descriptions.

preview.title: See Your Dashboard in Action
preview.subtitle: A preview of the interactive report you'll get — scores, breakdowns, and PR-level insights at a glance.

footer.description: AI-powered GitHub pull request analysis tool.
